description: Sent when a stage transition is blocked because the gate requirements are not met
subject: [G42 SaaS Factory] {{idea_name}} — Stage Transition Blocked
body:
⛔ Stage Transition Blocked

The transition from {{previous_stage}} to {{current_stage}} has been blocked because the gate requirements are not met.

Idea{{idea_name}}
Attempted Transition{{previous_stage}} → {{current_stage}}
Reason{{blocked_reason}}

Please complete the outstanding requirements and try again.

View Idea on GitHub

You are receiving this because you are listed as a stakeholder for this idea on the G42 SaaS Factory Board.
